title: boerhavia litoralis
intro: Boerhavia litoralis, also known as Red Sage or Red Spiderwort, is a perennial plant species in the Four O'Clock family (Nyctaginaceae), native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. The health benefits of Boerhavia litoralis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and kidney stones, as well as its ability to reduce stress and improve sleep quality. Boerhavia litoralis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies and folk medicine.
